sections.instruction: Use the standard nav when the template needs the clearest service, area, phone, and booking paths.
sections.name: Primary navigation

sections.instruction: Use the centered message for urgency while floaters carry immediate proof, service cues, or conversion nudges.
sections.name: Centered with left right floaters

sections.instruction: Use four short claims that validate speed, safety, rating, and locality.
sections.name: Trust bar

sections.instruction: Surface urgent service paths quickly and let visitors scan the most relevant offer without leaving the page.
sections.name: Scroll service cards

sections.instruction: Use this as useful content that keeps the promise fixed while response, diagnosis, options, and follow-up details move through.
sections.name: Sticky card stream content

sections.instruction: Handle urgent objections with expandable answers and no vague copy.
sections.name: FAQ accordion

sections.instruction: Show phone, email, hours, and form in a direct conversion area with a stronger primary button if urgency needs it.
sections.name: Contact section

sections.instruction: Lead with direct copy first, then use the image below to keep the page useful and quick to understand.
sections.name: Content top image bottom

sections.instruction: Use written reveal copy when a narrative point should build in short, readable beats.
sections.name: Scroll written reveal

sections.instruction: Keep core ideas visible while longer copy earns trust.
sections.name: Sticky ideas content

sections.instruction: Use overlapping feature rows when multiple narrative points need visual momentum without becoming service cards.
sections.name: Overlap feature rows

sections.instruction: Use for long-form about storytelling when the page needs local context, operating philosophy, and careful trust language.
sections.name: About story

sections.instruction: Use an editorial portrait and focused paragraph when a section needs human context or point-of-view.
sections.name: Portrait paragraph feature

sections.instruction: Use a content-height split layout when the section needs fixed-ratio imagery without hero-scale height.
sections.name: Split content with fixed image

sections.instruction: Translate regular content into an image-led editorial texture with one large positioning line.
sections.name: Split headline image content

sections.instruction: Use written reveal copy when a narrative point should build in short, readable beats.
sections.name: Scroll written reveal

sections.instruction: Use the standard nav when the template needs the clearest service, area, phone, and booking paths.
sections.name: Primary navigation

sections.instruction: Use h1, one primary booking CTA, one services CTA, and three compact trust stats beside a full-bleed image column.
sections.name: Split content and full image

sections.instruction: Use short repeated claims when there are many small proof points.
sections.name: Trust marquee

sections.instruction: Use bento-style service cards when the services need a richer visual scan pattern.
sections.name: Services bento cards

sections.instruction: Use an asymmetrical intro and feature card cluster when a why-choose-us section needs scannable proof points.
sections.name: Asymmetric feature cards

sections.instruction: Use two large three-column decision cards with a simple left-aligned header and link above them.
sections.name: Split large cards

sections.instruction: Use current process steps when the page needs a clearer, more styled decision sequence.
sections.name: Process steps

sections.instruction: Use when visitors need to confirm service coverage before starting a request.
sections.name: Service area zip lookup

sections.instruction: Handle objections with expandable answers and no vague copy.
sections.name: FAQ accordion

sections.instruction: Use the current conversion band when the page needs a polished direct next step.
sections.name: CTA

sections.instruction: End with service links, areas, contact details, and legal links.
sections.name: Footer

sections.instruction: Use the standard nav when the template needs the clearest service, area, phone, and booking paths.
sections.name: Primary navigation

sections.instruction: Use the mosaic to combine a clear h1, trust proof, service paths, and supporting visuals in one richer first view.
sections.name: Grid mosaic hero

sections.instruction: Use a short editorial thesis that frames why the business is different.
sections.name: Reveal paragraph

sections.instruction: Keep the core ideas visible while longer copy earns trust.
sections.name: Sticky ideas content

sections.instruction: Use this for regular about content with enough visual structure to feel useful instead of generic.
sections.name: General editorial texture

sections.instruction: Use static logos or associations when motion would distract from reading.
sections.name: Static trust logo grid

sections.instruction: Use varied quote lengths to create a fuller body of evidence.
sections.name: Masonry testimonials

sections.instruction: Use a discovered offer or next-step reveal to transition from editorial trust into action.
sections.name: Scroll reveal offer conversion

sections.instruction: Use a split hero with a bounded fixed-ratio image frame instead of a full-screen image.
sections.name: Fixed-ratio split image
